rulings.Case Title: MARTIN ENG VS. ELIZABETH HAI SOON LEE ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday March 3, 2016, line 9. DEFENDANT ELIZABETH SOON LEE, CARLY CRAM MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT GRANTED. Moving party shifted its burden. Opposing party failed to provide any argument or authority for the proposition that the term "possession" as used in SFRO 37.9(i)(1)(A) means only "legal possession." = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: CARMEN MCGUIRK VS. TAYLOR HAUGHT ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday March 3, 2016, line 10. DEFENDANT TAYLOR HAUGHT DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is SUSTAINED without leave to amend. Plaintiff failed to comply with SFRO 37.9A(f)(1) and serve the Notice of Termination of Tenancy on the tenant before delivering Notice of Intent to Withdraw to the Rent Board. Plaintiff cites no authority for the proposition that sending a Notice of Termination of Tenancy via e-mail to a registered process server satisfies the requirement of SFRO 37.9A(f)(1). Also, owner's Declaration is deficient and payment of relocation fees has not been made to "each tenant." = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: CARMEN MCGUIRK VS. BARBARA HAUGHT ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday March 3, 2016, line 10. DEFENDANT BARBARA HAUGHT, TERRY COBLE DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT SUSTAINED without leave to amend. Plaintiff failed to comply with SFRO 37.9A(f)(1) and serve the Notice of Termination of Tenancy on the tenant before delivering Notice of Intent to Withdraw to the Rent Board. Plaintiff cites no authority for the proposition that sending a Notice of Termination of Tenancy via e-mail to a registered process server satisfies the requirement of SFRO 37.9A(f)(1). Also, owner's Declaration is deficient and payment of relocation fees has not been made to "each tenant." = (501/REQ)
